title: Dashboard isn’t showing data from all connected boards—what setting am I missing?
excerpt: I’ve connected multiple boards to my dashboard, but some data isn’t showing up in the widgets. I’ve checked the connections and filters, but it still seems incomplete. Is there a specific setting I might be missing?

posts.author: DavisSmith (Davis Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve connected multiple boards to my dashboard, but some data isn’t showing up in the widgets. I’ve checked the connections and filters, but it still seems incomplete. Is there a specific setting I might be missing?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you double check the filter on the widget level as well as the dashboard level?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: DavisSmith (Davis Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, I double-checked both the widget and dashboard level filters.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Besides just ‘starting over’ on a new dashboard, I can’t think of any other ideas. Maybe try that and contact support?
